positive: A mesmerizing, stylized celestial tapestry featuring overlapping mandalas of abstract geometric elements, crescent moons, nebula swirls, and constellations. The primary colors should be deep indigo, ethereal turquoise, burnt orange, and rich gold, utilizing a minimalist, high-contrast line-art style with solid, clean color blocks. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, suitable for a circular or square textile print. Emphasize clean, crisp silhouettes, symmetry, and an overall sense of mystical grandeur. Art style should evoke Art Nouveau meets modern geometric etching, rendered with extreme clarity and perfect symmetry. Vector quality, print resolution.
negative: blur, artifacts, low detail, watermark, signature, text, words, logo, trademark, ugly, out of frame, badly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, photo, realism, deep shading, gradient noise
